top_signals.title: Codelco Fires Executive for Overstating Copper Output in Chile
top_signals.summary: Codelco fired one executive and reprimanded several others after an internal audit found Chile’s state copper producer overstated part of its 2025 output by classifying material that needed further processing as finished product.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
